title: Add LICENSE and crate README to rust/
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: rust/ contains LICENSE file matching license field; rust/README.md renders on crates.io with install usage; cargo package --list shows both included.
custom.beads_notes:
Ensure crate bundle includes legal and docs content required by crates.io.
Initiating crate publish work; see AGENTS instructions: no backward compatibility; will follow cargo package/publish flow.
Added rust/LICENSE (MIT) and rust/README.md for crate packaging; cargo package --locked includes both.
